Meridian Labs

Intelligent insights that power data-driven product decisions at scale.

Now Hiring: Lead Product Manager

San Francisco, CA (Remote-Friendly) · Full-time · $185,000 - $240,000 USD annually

W

e're seeking an experienced Lead Product Manager to own our analytics and insights product vertical and

lead a team of 4-5 engineers. In this role, you'll set the strategic vision for our core analytics products,

manage cross-functional roadmaps, mentor junior PMs, and work closely with engineering and design leadership

to deliver high-impact features. You'll drive product decisions using quantitative analysis, work with Amplitude

and Mixpanel data to validate hypotheses, and report directly to our VP of Product. This is an ideal opportunity for
a seasoned PM ready to scale both product and team.

A B O U T U S

Meridian Labs is a Series B analytics and product intelligence platform helping mid-market and enterprise

companies unlock deep user behavioral insights. We provide product teams with real-time analytics, feature

impact measurement, and predictive recommendations to accelerate product-market fit and revenue growth. Our

platform integrates seamlessly with existing data infrastructures and serves over 200+ companies across fintech,

SaaS, and e-commerce.

Y O U R R O L E

Own the product strategy, roadmap, and execution for the analytics platform vertical; set quarterly and annual

goals aligned with company OKRs and revenue targets

Lead and mentor a team of 4-5 full-stack and backend engineers; conduct 1-on-1s, performance reviews, and

career development planning

Define and prioritize product features using SQL-based data analysis, A/B testing frameworks, and insights
from Amplitude and Mixpanel to measure feature impact and user engagement

Partner with Engineering Lead and Design Director to scope features, manage dependencies, and unblock

technical challenges; facilitate weekly sync meetings and design reviews

Develop PRDs and technical specs for major initiatives; communicate product vision and rationale to

engineering team and cross-functional stakeholders

Conduct customer discovery calls with 15+ enterprise customers monthly; synthesize feedback into product

requirements and iterate based on user research

Establish and monitor product KPIs (activation, retention, NPS, ARPU) using dashboards in Tableau/Looker;

report weekly progress to executive team

 Mentor 1-2 junior PMs; provide guidance on frameworks, stakeholder management, and data-driven decision-

making

Lead quarterly business reviews with key accounts; identify upsell opportunities and product gaps that drive
revenue growth

R E Q U I R E D Q U A L I F I C AT I O N S

6+ years of product management experience, with at least 2 years in a lead or senior PM role managing product

teams or significant parts of a company roadmap

Proven track record shipping 5+ features from ideation to launch; demonstrated ability to work with SQL,

Amplitude, Mixpanel, or similar analytics platforms to drive decisions

Strong experience managing engineering teams (3-5 engineers); comfort with technical discussions, sprint

planning, and engineering resource allocation

Proficiency with data analysis tools and frameworks; experience building dashboards, running A/B tests, and

defining metrics-driven KPIs

Excellent communication and leadership skills; ability to present to executives, influence without authority, and
align diverse teams around a vision

B2B SaaS product experience; familiarity with analytics, data products, or developer tools is strongly preferred

D E S I R E D Q U A L I F I C AT I O N S

Experience with Looker, Tableau, or similar BI/visualization tools for creating product dashboards

Background in technical product management or working in data/analytics-heavy products

Understanding of SQL for data querying and basic analytics; ability to collaborate with analytics engineers

Experience scaling products from early traction to enterprise deployments

T O O L S  O F  T H E T R A D E

Amplitude, Mixpanel, SQL, Tableau, Looker, Jira, Figma, Slack, Python (for analytics scripting), Google

Analytics 4

W E O F F E R

Competitive equity package (0.15% - 0.35% for this level)

Comprehensive health coverage (medical, dental, vision) with 100% premium coverage for employees

401(k) matching up to 4% of salary

Unlimited PTO with encouragement to take 20+ days annually; 10 company holidays

Professional development budget ($3,000 annually) for courses, conferences, and certifications

Remote-first culture with optional access to San Francisco office; quarterly offsites in interesting locations

 Parental leave (16 weeks for primary caregivers, 12 weeks for non-primary)

Mental health support (free access to Calm, Ginger, and therapy stipend of $2,000 annually)

T O A P P LY

Submit your resume, a cover letter highlighting your PM experience and team leadership examples, and a link to
your portfolio (case studies, public writing, or past product examples) via our careers page at meridian-

labs.com/careers. Please include the code LEADPM2024 in the subject line. We review applications on a rolling

basis and move quickly for qualified candidates.
